channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: Trump Considering Emissions Pardons and Other Clemency
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to issue new pardons Friday for individuals convicted of federal emissions-related offenses as his administration winds down.

item.title: 5th Circuit Rules Against Trump DOJ on Mandatory Immigration Detention
Trump's Storytime Turns Into a Presidential Roast
item.description: President Donald Trump appeared on second lady Usha Vance's podcast, where guests read children's books, but Trump, known for going off-script, turned the event into a roast.

item.title: Bruce Blakeman to Newsmax: Democratic Socialists Hate America
item.description: Nassau County Executive Bruce Blakeman, the Republican nominee for New York governor, told Newsmax on Thursday that people must vote if they want change.
